pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which mandate this exact path.
Verified against export_result.sh which explicitly checks for this output path.
Verified against export_result.sh which explicitly checks for this plot path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real UrbanSim HDF5 dataset for San Francisco. A custom execution of the ground truth algorithm confirms that exactly 189 zones are evaluated. The city-wide average persons per residential unit is approximately 2.086, there are exactly 33 zones with a persons_per_unit ratio exceeding 3.0, and Zone 178 has the highest overcrowding risk index.
